name: Coffee_Lover
text: Beep boop! 🤖 Your website looks so premium, but maybe you need a coffee button next? ☕️

name: Prof. Miller
text: Impressive work on Gaussian Splatting! Looking forward to your CVPR presentation! 👏

text: Your papers on wearable AR interaction were super helpful for my thesis project! Thank you!

name: Optimist
text: This layout is cleaner than my room. Great UX!
